hypothesis: The combination of EMA crossover with Bollinger breakout and Volume Oscillator confirmation filters out weak momentum signals while capturing strong trend moves, especially during high-volume volatility periods that typically precede sustained price movements.

Volume surge confirmed by positive volume oscillator in a volatile regime signals strong momentum continuation, especially when price breaks out of Bollinger lower band after EMA 50 crossover, reducing false signals from ranging market conditions.

Combining EMA crossover with Bollinger breakout and volume confirmation filters out weak signals while capturing strong momentum moves. ATR-based risk management ensures position sizing adapts to volatility, reducing drawdowns during choppy periods.
